changelog:
🚀 Initial release — Steve Bot V1.0

E2/D2 trading system:
- 51-coin structural pool with top-35 D2 volume rotation
- Zone bounce LONG entries with adaptive trailing stop
- Telegram commands: /status, /positions, /pnl, /history
- Paper mode by default — say "go live" to trade real

See setup guide: https://stevebot-updates.pages.dev/
